user.title: Mortify Setup
user.description: Configure Mortify — the AI murder mystery game for your smart home. You need Ollama or LM Studio running locally.

data_description.tts_entity: Leave blank to use the speaker selected in-game
data_description.ha_url: The URL your guests will use to reach HA (shown in QR codes)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the local LLM. Make sure Ollama or LM Studio is running.

abort.already_configured: Mortify is already configured. Only one instance is supported.

create_entry.default: Mortify is ready. Open the sidebar to start your mystery.
